title: VIROCAPSID PDB corpus row (C3a) v2
description: Witness row per icosahedral protein cage entry fetched from RCSB PDB. Used to satisfy F-VIROCAPSID-1 (-genus / -1-b / -1-c / -1-d) corpus build (C3a partial n>=10, C3b full n>=100). Reference: .roadmap.virocapsid C3a checkpoint, .own own 1 demote condition (a). v2 (2026-05-06): subunit_count_declared = canonical Caspar-Klug 60*T (curator-asserted, geometry-grounded), independent of RCSB residue/instance counts which are dropped to rcsb_polymer_monomer_count / rcsb_polymer_entity_instance_count for divergence-axis tracking only.

schema.description: Schema version tag — locked v2 under C3a (2026-05-06). v1 deprecated due to subunit_count_declared misuse of RCSB residue count.

fetched_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the RCSB API fetch.

t_number_declared.description: T-number per curator annotation. Caspar-Klug triangulation index. F-VIROCAPSID-1-b stratum tag.

subunit_count_declared.description: Canonical 60 * t_number_declared. Caspar-Klug geometric ground truth, NOT RCSB metadata. RCSB observation surfaced separately for divergence-axis F-VIROCAPSID-1-d.

vertex_count_expected.description: sigma(6)=12 STRUCTURAL-EXACT prediction. Constant 12 by Caspar-Klug + Euler V-E+F=2 for any icosahedral cage T>=1. F-VIROCAPSID-1-genus axis.

resolution_angstrom.description: Crystal/cryo-EM resolution. null if not deposited.

source_class.description: Corpus stratum tag. F-NB-2-c / F-VIROCAPSID-1-c source-bias axis re-uses this enum.

title_hash.description: SHA-256[:16] of RCSB title field. Audit-only (avoids reproducing copyrighted title verbatim).

rcsb_polymer_monomer_count.description: RCSB observation: total residue count in biological assembly. Used by F-VIROCAPSID-1-d divergence axis (compare against subunit_count_declared * mean_residues_per_chain).

rcsb_polymer_entity_instance_count.description: RCSB observation: chain instance count. Often under-reports for icosahedral assemblies due to symmetry collapse to asymmetric unit. Used by F-VIROCAPSID-1-d for annotation-completeness scoring.
